title: Dress To Impress – Mystery Models Dolls – Wave 1
features: UNIQUE LOOKS: Each model rocks their own signature style, from vintage streetwear to gala glam!
MIX AND MATCH: Create endless looks by swapping each doll’s hair, top, bottom, accessory, and pair of shoes!
STRIKE A POSE: Each doll is articulated, allowing you to recreate your favorite iconic runway poses!
SHOW-STOPPING DISPLAY: Each doll comes with a sparkling gold-star display capsule and a special collector card - perfect for play and display!
THE REAL DEAL: This collectible doll is officially licensed Dress To Impress merch, by the Dress To Impress Group and PhatMojo.
description: From the manufacturer Dress To Impress – Mystery Models Dolls – Wave 1 Dress To Impress Become a runway star with this dazzling collection of Mystery Models! Dress To Impress Mystery Models Dolls – Wave 1 From the hottest fashion game, Dress to Impress, the Mystery Models Dolls are here to slay with the latest styles. Each posable model comes with a star-quality outfit you can mix and match with other models, a unique collector card, exclusive DLC, and a chic display capsule to showcase your award-winning poses. Start curating your stylish collection today! STRIKE A POSE: Each doll is articulated, allowing you to recreate your favorite iconic runway poses! THE REAL DEAL: This collectible doll is officially licensed Dress To Impress merch, by the Dress To Impress Group and PhatMojo. product_details_tab_data.description: From the brand Previous page Here at KandyToys we have a huge range of toys brought to you with over 40 years of experience. We're home to a number of household brands including M.Y and NALU, and based down in Devon! We've got everything from unicorns and dinosaurs to paddle boards and rollerskates. Whether it's traditional games and fun indoors or adventures outside, we've got something for everyone!
